top_signals.title: Education ministry to aid regional human resources development
top_signals.summary: The government's project would help support Japan's local essential services, from medical and elderly care to construction.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Spain stars lap up adulation of estimated 2 million on World Cup parade
top_signals.summary: Players passed around the gleaming World Cup trophy and waved to their adoring supporters, some lining balconies, others on top of bus stops.
